description_long: This shotgun features a robust, tactical design with a metallic brown finish and multiple black attachment points along the top and sides. The body is boxy and reinforced, with a visible cylindrical chamber and a prominent black pistol grip. The top of the weapon is lined with a series of rectangular mounting brackets, likely for accessory attachments. The front end is squared off, with a visible barrel opening and angular ridges running along the length of the upper receiver. The trigger and trigger guard are clearly defined, and the overall construction suggests a heavy-duty, urban-combat-oriented firearm. The materials and detailing indicate a modern, high-capacity shotgun suitable for demanding environments.
description: A heavy, tactical shotgun with a metallic brown body, black grip, and multiple mounting brackets, designed for urban combat scenarios.
description_view_0: Front view showing the squared barrel opening and angular ridges along the top.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cylindrical chamber, black pistol grip, and multiple mounting brackets on the upper body.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the barrel and the symmetrical, reinforced upper receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the same chamber and grip, with clear visibility of the mounting brackets and overall boxy structure.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a squared, reinforced front and visible ribbing along the top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
